summary_formulas.formula:
=IF(
  A79="Dollar Amount",
  "Replace",
  IF(
    OR(A79="Labor Unit", A79="Tesla"),
    "Rpr",
    ""
  )
)
=IF(OR(A79="Dollar Amount", A79="Labor Unit"), "Pre-Scan", IF(A79="Tesla", "Trim to Access Scanner", ""))

=IF(
  A79="Dollar Amount",
  "Replace",
  IF(
    OR(A79="Labor Unit", A79="Tesla"),
    "Rpr",
    ""
  )
)
=IF(OR(A79="Dollar Amount", A79="Labor Unit"), "In-Process Scan", IF(A79="Tesla", "Tesla Toolbox Scan", ""))

=IF(
  A79="Dollar Amount",
  "Replace",
  IF(
    OR(A79="Labor Unit", A79="Tesla"),
    "Rpr",
    ""
  )
)
=IF(OR(A79="Dollar Amount", A79="Labor Unit"), "Post Scan", IF(A79="Tesla", "Tesla Software Script Programming", ""))
